description_long: This humanoid robot features a sleek, matte black exterior with a large, rounded head and two prominent, circular yellow eyes that give it a friendly, approachable appearance. Its head is smooth with minimal surface detailing, except for subtle panel lines and a circular feature on the back. The torso is compact and segmented, connecting to robust, articulated limbs with visible joint structures at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees, allowing for a wide range of motion. The arms are elongated and end in three-fingered hands, while the legs are thick and sturdy, terminating in broad, rounded feet designed for stability. The back of the head and torso display additional mechanical detailing, such as circular access panels and vent-like structures. The overall design suggests a functional, urban-ready robot capable of interacting with its environment and performing tasks alongside humans.
description: A matte black humanoid robot with a large, rounded head, glowing yellow eyes, articulated limbs, and robust, mechanical detailing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's large yellow eyes, rounded head, segmented torso, and articulated limbs with three-fingered hands.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the circular feature on the side of the head, the curvature of the limbs, and the mechanical joints.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back paneling on the head and torso, as well as the symmetrical design of the arms and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the circular head feature and the articulation of the limbs.
attribute_pose: The robot is standing upright with its arms relaxed at its sides and legs slightly apart. The head is facing forward, and the limbs are symmetrically positioned.
attribute_clothing_style: The robot is unclothed, featuring only integrated panels and mechanical components with no decorative coverings.
attribute_facial_features: The face consists of a smooth, rounded surface with two large, circular yellow eyes and no visible mouth or nose. The eyes are expressive and prominent, while the rest of the face is featureless.
attribute_limb_articulation: The robot has visible ball or rotary joints at the shoulders, elbows, hips, and knees, with articulated wrists and ankles. The hands have three articulated fingers each, and the limbs appear capable of a wide range of motion.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Visible sensors include two large optical sensors (eyes) on the front of the head; no other sensors are apparent.
